code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut sorted = true

  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(byte_or_zero(line, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws(byte_or_zero(line, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if have_prev
          if v < prev
            sorted = false
          end
        end
        prev = v
        have_prev = true
      when None
        sorted = false
      end
    end
  end

  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
